commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the real behavior proof parser and tests so Markdown headings, field labels, and missing-proof text inside fenced terminal output do not confuse proof parsing.

PR surface: Tests +63, Other +68. Total +131 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. A source-level merge-tree check against current main shows the PR merge result replaces the bounded membership response read with raw response.json() and removes the matching oversized-response tests; no runtime tests were run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair can reapply the fence-aware parser work on current main while restoring the bounded GitHub API response helper and tests.

target.title: fix(ci): ignore fenced headings in proof parser
target.body:
## Summary

Hardens the Real behavior proof parser so Markdown-looking headings and proof-like text copied inside fenced terminal output do not end, replace, or invalidate the proof section early.

This keeps the existing proof field requirements and mock-only checks intact. The parser now uses fence tracking for proof-section discovery, proof-section slicing, per-field value extraction, label stripping for whole-section scans, and the standalone missing-proof scan. Headings and copied phrases inside backtick or tilde fences stay transcript content; real PR-body headings and proof-field labels still delimit sections and fields outside fences. Field-level missing-value checks now also ignore Markdown fence wrapper lines so an actual fenced `What was not tested` value containing only `not tested` is still rejected.

## Context

PR #87341 exposed the original bug: its real behavior proof copied a generated prompt that contained `## TOOLS.md` inside a fenced output block. The parser treated that line as the next PR-body heading and could miss later proof fields.

Follow-up review found related edges in the same parser path: same-length info-string fences like ```` ```js ```` are content inside an outer transcript, copied headings such as `## Real behavior proof` must not become new proof sections, copied field-template lines such as `Observed result: not tested` must not become field starts, copied standalone phrases such as `not tested` inside fenced output must not trigger the missing-proof rejection, copied field-template lines whose value is a bare fence such as ```` Observed result: ``` ```` must not mutate fence state, and actual fenced missing-proof field values must still be rejected.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Real behavior proof sections and fields keep parseable content after copied terminal output that contains Markdown headings, proof-field-looking lines, bare-fence field-template lines, and standalone missing-proof phrases such as `not tested`; actual proof fields whose fenced value contains only missing-proof text are rejected.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout worktree `.worktrees/87390-proof-parser-fence-aware-section` on macOS, branch `codex/proof-parser-fence-aware-section`, commit `2af4cf27d4fc6e0f8780734177bf68c0b7354d40`, Node `v26.0.0`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a direct local node smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs` with a synthetic external PR body whose actual `What was not tested` field is a fenced block containing only `not tested`. Also ran the focused policy test file with the repo Vitest wrapper.

Evidence after fix: The direct node smoke returned `status: missing`, `reason: Real behavior proof is missing required field content: notTested.`, and `missingFields: ["notTested"]`, proving the parser rejects the fenced missing-proof field value after commit `2af4cf27d4fc6e0f8780734177bf68c0b7354d40`. Focused regression tests passed 1 file / 28 tests. Copied smoke output is included below.

Observed result after fix: `evaluateRealBehaviorProof` still ignores copied proof-template field lines inside fenced output, and now rejects a real proof field whose fenced value contains only `not tested` instead of labeling that proof sufficient.

What was not tested: Live GitHub Actions proof-gate rerun on commit `2af4cf27d4fc6e0f8780734177bf68c0b7354d40`. External autoreview was not rerun because the escalation was rejected by policy for sending workspace diff data to an external review engine; this closeout used local source inspection plus focused local parser proof instead.

Direct parser smoke output:

```text
{
  "status": "missing",
  "reason": "Real behavior proof is missing required field content: notTested.",
  "missingFields": [
    "notTested"
  ]
}
```

## Verification

- `node --input-type=module` direct parser smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/real-behavior-proof-policy.test.ts` (1 file / 28 tests passed)
- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

Refs #87341
